name: Timeline
code:
name = "Timeline"
inputs = {"play":"exec","stop":"exec","reverse":"exec","duration":"float","looping":"bool","play_rate":"float"}
outputs = {"exec_out":"exec","update":"exec","finished":"exec","direction_changed":"exec","alpha":"float","time":"float"}
def process(play, stop, reverse, duration, looping, play_rate):
    # Timeline - smooth animation driver
    # Use for UI animations, transitions, and timed sequences
    #
    # Inputs:
    #   play: Start/resume playing forward
    #   stop: Pause the timeline
    #   reverse: Play in reverse direction
    #   duration: Length in seconds (default 1.0)
    #   looping: Restart when finished
    #   play_rate: Speed multiplier (default 1.0)
    #
    # Outputs:
    #   exec_out: Fires when play/stop/reverse triggered
    #   update: Fires each frame while playing
    #   finished: Fires when timeline completes
    #   direction_changed: Fires when direction reverses
    #   alpha: 0.0 to 1.0 normalized progress
    #   time: Current time in seconds
    #
    # Timeline handling is done by the runtime.
    return ('exec_out', 'update', 'finished', 'direction_changed', 0.0, 0.0)
